mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, description, created_at FROM genres WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name}) LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, slug, description, created_at FROM genres WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, slug, description, created_at FROM genres ORDER BY name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO genres (name, slug, description, color_hex, icon_name, is_fiction) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{colorHex}, #{iconName}, #{isFiction})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM genres WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
